name: PT Alkindo Naratama Tbk
summary: PT Alkindo Naratama Tbk produces and sells various paper products in Indonesia. It operates through Paper Converting, Chemical, and Polymer segments. The company offers papercore products, such as STD cores for packaging film, stretch, construction film, and paper mill industries; WG cores for PP film, PE film, coated paper, and towel and tissue paper industries; SPC cores to minimize surface markings, and enhance winding and unwinding characteristics; and Prime cores for delicate plastic and metal foils. It also provides POY, FDY, and drawn textured yarn papertubes for use in various machines in textile yarn and synthetic fibers industries; honeycomb pallets and boxes, layers and pads, furniture cores, and textile boards/spacers under the HEXCELL name; and supporting products, including edge, L-shape, and outer and inner diameter protectors. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Bandung, Indonesia. PT Alkindo Naratama Tbk is a subsidiary of PT Golden Arista International.
